modules.name: EvenSum
modules.responsibility: Compute the sum of even integers in a list.

returns.description: Sum of even integers; 0 if none or empty input.

raises.when: numbers is not a list of integers.

data_flow.name: SumEvenCall
data_flow.data_description: A list of integers in; a single integer sum out.

tech_decisions.rationale: Matches the pipeline's Python-only MVP target and the requirement for type hints.

criteria_coverage.notes: sum_even filters even integers and returns their sum.
Empty input returns 0 via the same function.

assumptions_made.description: An empty input list should return 0 rather than raising; the brief did not specify but 0 is the natural identity for a sum.
